name: @cyango-tools/skills
description: CLI to install Cyango agent skills

scripts.publish:patch: npm run bump:patch && npm publish --access public --registry https://registry.npmjs.org/ '--@cyango-tools:registry=https://registry.npmjs.org/'
scripts.publish:minor: npm run bump:minor && npm publish --access public --registry https://registry.npmjs.org/ '--@cyango-tools:registry=https://registry.npmjs.org/'
scripts.publish:major: npm run bump:major && npm publish --access public --registry https://registry.npmjs.org/ '--@cyango-tools:registry=https://registry.npmjs.org/'
